purpose: Cat-C orthogonal-real failures gating for M4 fixes
method: Failures are real bugs orthogonal to the archived-cmd-test or vuln-source-parity domains. Computed as: failing_tests \ Cat-A \ Cat-B (set difference on test-fn-leaf-name). Each entry includes the source location of the test fn (located by walking crates/**/*.rs for `fn <name>` preceded by a #[test]/#[tokio::test] attribute). Module path from the cargo-output failure marker is preserved for disambiguation when the same test name appears in multiple binaries. root_cause/disposition/fix_sketch fields are placeholders pending M4 worker investigation per dispatch-contract §M4. Each entry's root_cause is derived from the panic excerpt in M1-red-capture.txt; disposition is FIX (16-25 expected per dispatch-contract; this enumeration produces 41 unique). The 41 vs 16-25 estimate gap reflects more orthogonal regressions surfacing now than the dispatch-contract anticipated; per validator_mandate m1_enumeration_authoritative_over_plan_estimate, M1's count is binding.

entries.root_cause: Generic-evidence text formatter doesn't render float values; output shows '1 findings' but test expects per-finding float numbers in evidence text. Likely a regression or recent format change in commands/bugbot/text_format.rs.
entries.fix_sketch: Inspect generic-evidence rendering path in commands/bugbot/text_format.rs around line 2356; ensure float evidence values are emitted in the textual output.
entries.panic_excerpt: thread 'commands::bugbot::text_format::tests::test_text_format_generic_evidence_shows_numbers' (224582610) panicked at crates/tldr-cli/src/commands/bugbot/text_format.rs:2356:9: generic should show float values, got: bugbot check -- 1 findings (1 low)   1 files analyzed, 1 functions, 42ms  [LOW] some-unknown-type in src/test.rs   test_fn (line 1)   Test finding   string_field: hello   number_field
